name: Agno
description: Python framework for building multi-agent platforms — define agents in code, deploy as FastAPI services. 40k GitHub stars. Supports MCP, 20+ models, memory layers.

skills.name: Agent Definition
skills.description: Define agents with model, tools, instructions, memory, and storage in a few lines of Python code.

skills.name: Team Orchestration
skills.description: Coordinate multi-agent teams with route, collaborate, or coordinate modes for complex task delegation.

skills.name: FastAPI Deployment
skills.description: Deploy any agent as a production FastAPI endpoint with session management and streaming support.
